reviews.review_title: Really good game can't wait for v2
reviews.review_description: This game is really fun it also getting revamped so I can't wait for that so play this game now
I would love to help you out with toxic people and make the game a safer place

developer_response.body:
Hello thanks for the rating

unfortunatly asking for mod is against the rules due to alot of people having the moderator role and i cannot keep track of the new people that are moderators
sorry.
-XVR (owner of Kangaroo Run!)

reviews.review_description: Hi owner I’m friends with a mod you banned me aswell but pls can I have mod love your up dates and maps love it that’s it

developer_response.body: hi thanks for the review! but i cannot give you moderator as it says in rule 3 ingame

reviews.review_description: Thx for the great reviews I'll tlak to the over owner and moderators see what we can do

This is a fun game! I’ve been playing it every time I’m free! But the amount of inappropriate behavior that people are doing to kids is not acceptable. Which is why I’d like to qualify for a mod to make this game a better place! I have had experience with project fire and can help make sure this is a kid friendly environment!

developer_response.body:
Hello!
thanks for the rating and feedback

i have read your rating and i understand people are doing bad things in the game so i have just wrote a important notice in 1.55 and yes i am angry about the bad behavior but hopefully it stops because im in the game almost everyday
thanks. -XVR (owner of Kangaroo Run!)
